For Apollo 15, 16, and 17, NASA sent up the battery powered Lunar Roving Vehicle so the astronauts could extend their range as they explored the moon. Weighing only 76 lbs on the moon, the moon buggy helped the astronauts transport equipment and samples around, and all three are still on the moon!

Albert Einstein (1879–1955), German-born physicist, formulated the theory of relativity and iconic equation E=mc². Nobel Prize in Physics 1921. Fled Nazi Germany, settled in the US. A pacifist and advocate for civil rights. Passed away in 1955, leaving a lasting legacy in science.

Little tip that helped me with eating disorder recovery: change the units on your scales to ones you don't understand.
